subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-01-09 in Abu Sinan
subcodes.first_line: This war is indeed ruinous and devastating in its effects. However, afterwards, the number of peace-loving people will grow considerably
subcodes.first_line_orig: این جنگ بلای خانمانسوزی است ولی بعد از این نفوس صلحجو زیاد خواهد شد
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @predictions and prophecies, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
